hero.headline:
Clean Pools, Zero Chemicals, Pure Peace
of Mind
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves better than harsh chemicals and salt systems. Green Energy Products brings 19 years of innovation to South Florida pools with MineralPURE and OzoneMAX technology that keeps water crystal clear — naturally. Veteran-owned, government-trusted, and backed by real results.

services.label: Our Solutions
services.headline: Sustainable Pool & Energy Solutions<br class="hidden md:block"> for South Florida
services.subtitle: From chemical-free pool water to solar-powered savings, we deliver proven green technology that protects your family, your wallet, and the environment.

cards.title: Chemical-Free Pool Treatment
cards.description: MineralPURE ionization and OzoneMAX systems keep your pool sparkling clean without chlorine, salt, or harsh chemicals. Healthier water for your family.

cards.title: Solar Water Heating
cards.description: Cut water heating costs by up to 80% with commercial and residential solar thermal systems. Enjoy warm pools year-round using free energy from the sun.

cards.title: ScaleBlaster Water Treatment
cards.description: The world's leading electronic water conditioner eliminates hard water problems and limescale buildup without chemicals, salt, or maintenance.

cards.title: Solar Power & Off-Grid
cards.description: Residential and commercial solar installations that reduce your electric bill to near zero. Off-grid solutions for complete energy independence.

cards.title: Energy Efficiency Consulting
cards.description: Comprehensive energy audits that identify savings opportunities across your property. We find the waste and deliver solutions that pay for themselves.

cards.title: LED & Green Upgrades
cards.description: Energy-efficient LED lighting, indoor air quality solutions, and healthy home upgrades that lower bills and improve your living environment.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Greener, Cleaner Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Assessment
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and energy goals. Our certified team will evaluate your property and recommend the right chemical-free or solar solution — no pressure, no obligation.

steps.title: We Install & Optimize
steps.description: Our NABCEP-certified installers and licensed contractors handle everything. From MineralPURE pool systems to solar panels, we get it done right the first time.

steps.title: Enjoy Clean Water & Savings
steps.description: Swim in chemical-free water, watch your energy bills drop, and feel good about your environmental impact. Our systems pay for themselves while protecting your family.

about.label: Why South Florida Trusts Us
about.headline: Veteran-Owned, Government-Trusted, Results-Proven
about.description: Green Energy Products has been bringing clean, sustainable solutions to South Florida since 2007. As a Service Disabled Veteran Owned Small Business, we bring military discipline and integrity to every project. Our client list includes Wyndham Hotels, FIU, Barry University, and the American Red Cross — organizations that demand proven results. We are proud partners of A National Solar LLC with NABCEP Certified Installers, and our team includes certified solar, electrical, and construction contractors ready to serve your home or business.

features.title: NABCEP Certified Installers
features.description: Our solar installation team holds the highest industry certification, ensuring your system is designed and installed to the highest professional standards.

features.title: Government Contract Experience
features.description: Trusted by Miami-Dade County, Florida Public Schools, and major institutions. We meet the strictest compliance and quality requirements.

features.title: Chemical-Free Guarantee
features.description: Our MineralPURE and OzoneMAX pool systems eliminate harsh chemicals. Healthier water, less maintenance, and no more red eyes or skin irritation.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. Real Savings.
pricing.subtitle: Every property is different. Contact us for a free, customized quote based on your specific pool and energy needs — no hidden fees, no surprises.

guarantee.headline: Our "Clean & Green" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If our chemical-free pool system doesn't deliver crystal-clear water, or if our energy solution doesn't reduce your consumption as promised, we'll make it right at no additional cost. We've built our reputation on results for 19 years — from Wyndham Hotels to local homeowners — and we stand behind every installation.

faqs.question: How do chemical-free pool systems actually work?
faqs.answer: Our MineralPURE system uses copper and silver ionization to sanitize water naturally, while OzoneMAX generates ozone to oxidize contaminants. Together, they eliminate the need for chlorine, salt, or harsh chemicals — giving you crystal-clear, skin-friendly water.

faqs.question: Will solar water heating work for my pool year-round in Florida?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. South Florida's climate is ideal for solar water heating. Our systems can extend your pool season to 12 months and reduce water heating costs by up to 80%. We design each system based on your pool size and sun exposure for maximum efficiency.

faqs.question: Do you work with commercial and government clients?
faqs.answer: Yes. We are an SBA-qualified SDVOSB and hold Miami-Dade County Micro/SBE Certification. We serve government agencies, hotels, universities, and commercial properties. Our notable clients include Wyndham Hotels, FIU, Barry University, and the American Red Cross.

faqs.question: How long does installation typically take?
faqs.answer: Most residential pool treatment systems are installed in a single day. Solar water heating and solar power systems typically take 1-3 days depending on system size. We schedule around your availability and handle all permitting and inspections.

faqs.question: What kind of savings can I expect?
faqs.answer: Results vary by system. Solar water heating can cut heating costs by up to 80%. ScaleBlaster eliminates ongoing chemical purchases for water treatment. Our energy efficiency audits typically identify 20-40% savings opportunities. We provide projected ROI before you commit.

testimonials.name: Margaret S.
testimonials.text: Working with Green Energy Products has been a pleasure. Being environmentally responsible is important to us, and their team provided incredible attention to detail throughout the entire process. The results speak for themselves.

testimonials.name: David R.
testimonials.text: We needed a chemical-free pool solution for our hotel property that would meet health department standards while reducing maintenance costs. Green Energy Products delivered on every front. Our guests love the water quality.

testimonials.name: Carolina M.
testimonials.text: After years of dealing with chlorine and salt systems, switching to MineralPURE was a game-changer. No more red eyes for the kids, no chemical smell, and the water is always crystal clear. Plus our energy bills dropped with their solar recommendations.
